basic_details.job_title: SSC Stenographer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 731 Grade C & D Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Stenographer Grade C (Group ‘B’ Non-Gazetted) Stenographer Grade D (Group ‘C’)
basic_details.short_information: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has published the Stenographer Grade ‘C’ & ‘D’ Examination 2026 Notification on 24th April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill approximately 731 tentative vacancies for Stenographer Grade C (Group B Non-Gazetted) & Grade D (Group C) posts in various Ministries/Departments/Organizations of Govt. of India. Candidates aged 18-30 years (Grade C) / 18-27 years (Grade D) as on 01.08.2026, with 12th standard pass & stenography skills, are eligible to apply online only at ssc.gov.in from 24 April to 15 May 2026

application_fee.details: For General / OBC (NCL) / EWS: ₹100/- For SC / ST / PwBD / ESM / Women: No fee (exempted) Pay online via BHIM UPI / Net Banking / Card

age_limit.age_details: 18-30 Yrs (Grade C) / 18-27 Yrs (Grade D) as on 01.08.2026
age_limit.details: Crucial date: 01.08.2026 (born not before 02.08.1996 & not later than 01.08.2008 for Grade C; adjust for Grade D).

qualification.details: Nationality: Indian citizen / Subject of Nepal/Bhutan / Tibetan refugee (before 01.01.1962) / Person of Indian origin from specified countries (eligibility certificate required). | Essential Educational Qualification (as on 01.08.2026)

salary_details.stenographer grade c (post selection): Pay Level-7 (₹44,900 - 1,42,400); approx. CTC ₹10-12 LPA (incl. DA, HRA, perks).
salary_details.stenographer grade d (post selection): Pay Level-4 (₹25,500 - 81,100); approx. CTC ₹6-8 LPA (incl. DA, HRA, perks).
salary_details.additional benefits: DA, HRA/quarters, TA, medical, PF, gratuity, pension, leave encashment etc. as per rules.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT): 200 marks (objective; General Intelligence & Reasoning 50
20% others. Skill Test in Stenography (Qualifying): Grade C: 100 wpm (English/Hindi); Grade D: 80 wpm (English/Hindi) (10 min dictation; 40% UR/EWS
35% others pass marks). Document Verification (DV) by User Departments. Final Merit: Based on CBT marks (category-wise); All India Service Liability.
Pre-Employment Medical Exam (esp. for BRO posts with Physical Efficiency Test).
how_to_apply: Apply online only via ssc.gov.in → One Time Registration (OTR) → Stenographer 2026 section.
Capture live photo (webcam), upload signature (10-20 KB JPEG).
Fill details, pay fee (if applicable), submit.
Print application for records; active email/mobile required.
important_instructions: Read notification carefully before applying. Ensure eligibility (esp. stenography skill, age/EQ cut-off 01.08.2026). Upload clear photo/signature; Aadhaar authentication recommended. Govt/PSU: NOC/undertaking required. Keep email/mobile active; no fee refund. SSC reserves right to modify/cancel; no waiting list (sliding mechanism for FRTA). Posts AISL; BRO posts need physical/medical standards (males only for BRO Grade D).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for SSC Stenographer 2026 is 15 May 2026 (23:00 Hrs). Candidates must complete registration and fee payment before the deadline. Applications submitted after the closing date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SSC Stenographer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SSC has announced approximately 731 tentative vacancies for Grade C and Grade D posts. The exact category-wise vacancy details will be updated later. Candidates are advised to check the official website regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility qualification for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th standard or equivalent from a recognized board. In addition to educational qualification, stenography skill is mandatory. The skill test will be conducted during the selection process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SSC Stenographer Grade C & D 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for Grade C is 18 to 30 years and for Grade D is 18 to 27 years. The crucial date for calculating age is 01 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹100 for General, OBC, and EWS candidates. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, PwBD, ESM, and women categories are exempted. The fee can be paid through online modes like UPI, net banking, or debit/credit cards.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer-Based Test followed by a stenography skill test. Candidates who qualify both stages will be called for document verification. Final selection is based on CBT marks.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for SSC Stenographer Grade C and D posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Grade C is under Pay Level-7 ranging from ₹44,900 to ₹1,42,400. For Grade D, the salary falls under Pay Level-4 ranging from ₹25,500 to ₹81,100. Additional benefits like DA, HRA, and other allowances are also provided.

faq.question: Q8. When will the SSC Stenographer 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The SSC Stenographer 2026 exam is expected to be held in July–August 2026. The exact exam dates will be announced officially on the SSC website. Candidates should stay updated and prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply online for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official SSC website by completing One-Time Registration. After registration, they need to fill the application form and upload required documents. The form must be submitted before the deadline.

faq.question: Q10. Is stenography skill compulsory for SSC Stenographer jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, stenography skill is compulsory for both Grade C and Grade D posts. Candidates must qualify the skill test to be considered for final selection. Without passing the skill test, candidates will not be eligible for recruitment.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SSC Stenographer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for SSC Stenographer 2026 is 15 May 2026 (23:00 Hrs). Candidates must complete registration and fee payment before the deadline. Applications submitted after the closing date will not be accepted.
